subject: [PATCH mm-stable v3] mm/memcontrol: batch memcg charging in __memcg_slab_post_alloc_hook

reviews.author: Shakeel Butt
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about adding complexity without actual users and suggested benchmarking kmem_cache_alloc_bulk(GFP_ACCOUNT) usage.

reviews.author: Harry Yoo (Oracle)
reviews.summary: Identified a SLAB_ACCOUNT user in io_uring.c and suggested revisiting the slab side to optimize __memcg_slab_free_hook() by sorting objects by slab cache.

2026-03-31.patch_summary: Patch proposes to batch memcg charging in __memcg_slab_post_alloc_hook, but reviewers raise concerns about the complexity and lack of actual users.
